ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_groups" (
  "group_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the user group within the PLM system */,
  "group_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the user group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_group_memberships" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the user (foreign key) */,
  "group_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the user group (foreign key) */,
  "membership_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "perm_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "perm_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (read, write, create, unlink) */,
  "perm_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("perm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource */,
  "model_id" TEXT /* Model identifier related to the resource */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource (e.g., document, component, product) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "group_permissions" (
  "group_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the user group (foreign key) */,
  "resource_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the resource (foreign key) */,
  "perm_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the permission (foreign key) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id", "resource_id", "perm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_hierarchy" (
  "parent_resource_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the parent resource (foreign key) */,
  "child_resource_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the child resource (foreign key) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parent_resource_id", "child_resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "group_id" TEXT /* Identifier of the user group affected */,
  "resource_id" TEXT /* Identifier of the resource affected */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., 'grant', 'revoke') */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "actor_user_id" TEXT /* Identifier of the user who performed the action (foreign key) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES user_groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_actor_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("actor_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "password_reset_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each password reset request */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the user requesting the password reset (foreign key) */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date when the password reset request was made */,
  "reset_date" TEXT /* Date when the password was reset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_password_reset_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
